site.name: GoChina Путешествие
site.tagline: Спланируйте поездку в Китай по безвизу 144/240 часов

home.heroSubtitle: Всё о въезде, оплате, перемещении и бюджете — для путешественников по новому безвизовому режиму.

painPoints.title: 4 главных вопроса путешественника
painPoints.subtitle: Мы делаем инструменты, а не статьи. Двигайте ползунки — получите ответ.

items.title: How do I enter?
items.text: 144 or 240 hour visa-free at 20+ airports. See eligible ports and required documents.

items.title: How do I pay?
items.text: Bind your Visa or Mastercard to Alipay / WeChat Pay in 5 minutes. Cash and ATMs also work.

items.title: How do I move?
items.text: High-speed rail, metro, DiDi ride-hailing, bike-share — all foreigner-friendly.

items.title: How much does it cost?
items.text: Itemized budget calculator with per-city breakdown in USD and CNY.

card144.label: 144 часа
card144.text: В пределах одного региона. Проще и быстрее.

card240.label: 240 часов
card240.text: Больше провинций, идеально для нескольких городов.

budget.title: Калькулятор бюджета
budget.text: Разбивка по городам за секунды. URL для отправки.

planner.title: Планер маршрута
planner.text: Выберите часы и интересы — получите маршрут.

visa.title: 144 vs 240 часов безвиз
visa.subtitle: Оба режима позволяют въехать в Китай без визы. Разница — в длительности и охвате.
visa.portsIntro: Both policies share most major airports. The list below is the union of 144h + 240h ports. Always check the latest list on the official site before booking.
applySteps: Arrive at an eligible international airport with your passport, onward ticket, and (if needed) a visa for your third destination.
At the transit counter, request the 144 / 240-hour visa-free transit permit. Border officers verify your documents in 5–15 minutes.
Collect your permit and enter China. Keep the paper permit with you throughout your stay — hotels will request it at check-in.
tips: Departure must be from the same or an eligible port in the same region.
Your onward ticket must go to a third country / region, not back to your origin.
Hotel staff are required to register foreign guests — carry your passport at all times.
If you enter under 240h, you can now move between many adjacent provinces.
visa.ctaTitle: Once you know your visa, plan the trip.
visa.ctaSubtitle: Open the budget calculator to see what your days in China will actually cost.

calculator.title: Калькулятор бюджета
calculator.subtitle: Двигайте ползунки — сумма обновляется мгновенно. Поделитесь URL.
calculator.note: Оценка по средним ценам Booking/Trip.com 2025-2026. Реальные цены зависят от сезона — это отправная точка.
calculator.calcBody: We use 2025–2026 averages from Booking.com, Trip.com, and 12306 for high-speed rail. For travelers above 1, hotels are billed per room (1 room per 2 people); food, transport, attractions and rail tickets scale per person. Shopping and other costs are entered as per-person amounts and multiplied by your group size.
calculator.fxNote: FX rate: 1 USD = 7.20 CNY (updated 2026-01-15). Actual bank rates will vary by 1–3%. Peak season (Chinese New Year, Golden Week) prices can rise 30–50%.

citiesPage.title: Pick a city, or a few.
citiesPage.subtitle: Five gateway cities covered by both 144h and 240h policies. Tap any of them for visa rules, attractions, and a per-city cost breakdown.

gz.name: Guangzhou
gz.tag: Cantonese food, Pearl River, Lingnan culture

beijing.name: Beijing
beijing.tagline: The imperial capital — Forbidden City, Great Wall, and 3,000 years of history.
beijing.gettingInBody: Beijing has two international airports: PEK (Capital) and PKX (Daxing). Both accept 144h and 240h transit permits. Subway and airport express connect both to downtown in 30–60 minutes.

shanghai.name: Shanghai
shanghai.tagline: The futuristic Bund — skyline, dumplings, and a 24/7 pulse.
shanghai.gettingInBody: Shanghai has two airports: PVG (Pudong, main international) and SHA (Hongqiao, mostly domestic + regional). Maglev from PVG reaches Longyang Rd in 8 minutes; from there, metro Line 2 takes you downtown in 50 minutes.

guangzhou.name: Guangzhou
guangzhou.tagline: Cantonese food capital — dim sum, river cruises, and Lingnan heritage.
guangzhou.gettingInBody: CAN (Baiyun) is Guangzhou's main airport. Metro Line 3 runs from the airport to Tiyu Xilu (Canton Tower area) in 45 minutes. Taxis take 30–40 minutes depending on traffic.

chengdu.name: Chengdu
chengdu.tagline: Home of the giant panda — Sichuan food, tea houses, and relaxed pace.
chengdu.gettingInBody: Chengdu has two airports: CTU (Shuangliu, central, more flights) and TFU (Tianfu, newer). Metro Line 10 connects TFU to downtown in 40 minutes. CTU has Line 10 too, 25 minutes.

xian.name: Xi'an
xian.tagline: Terracotta Warriors and the ancient Silk Road starting point.
xian.gettingInBody: XIY (Xianyang) is Xi'an's airport, about 40 km northwest. The airport intercity railway reaches Xi'an North Railway Station in 16 minutes — from there, metro Line 2 to Bell Tower takes another 20 minutes.

planner.title: Планер маршрута
planner.subtitle: Выберите часы и интересы — получите маршрут с дневными карточками и оценкой бюджета. Откройте калькулятор для деталей.
planner.noMatch: Нет подходящих городов. Попробуйте 240 ч или добавьте интерес.
planner.visaNote144: При 144 ч въезд только через Пекин, Шанхай или Гуанчжоу, в пределах региона.
planner.visaNote240: При 240 ч — въезд через 16+ пунктов, перемещение по большинству провинций.
planner.disclaimer: Маршрут — предложение на основе ваших вводов. Время в пути, часы работы и цены меняются — уточняйте перед бронированием.
planner.breakdownBody: The planner gives you a quick estimate. The calculator lets you tweak every line — hotel, food, transport, shopping.

payment.title: Платите как местный за 5 минут
payment.subtitle: Главное изменение для иностранцев с 2024: можно привязать Visa/Mastercard к Alipay и WeChat Pay. Наличные, банкоматы и карты тоже работают.

methods.name: Alipay (支付宝)
methods.summary: Bind your Visa / Mastercard / Amex / JCB in the app. Works at virtually every shop, restaurant, metro, taxi, and attraction in China.
steps: Download Alipay (search 'Alipay' in your app store, or use the international version).
Open the app, tap 'Services' or 'Me → Bank Cards / Add Card'.
Enter your card details. Alipay verifies with a small charge (~$0.50) that refunds in 1–3 days.
Set a 6-digit payment password. You're done — start scanning merchant QR codes.
methods.limits: Single transaction: ~$1,000 (without extra verification). Annual: $50,000. Above that, upload a passport photo to raise limits.
methods.fee: No fee from Alipay. Your bank may charge a 1–3% foreign transaction fee.

methods.name: WeChat Pay (微信支付)
methods.summary: Same flow as Alipay, integrated inside WeChat. Many Chinese merchants prefer it, and you'll need it for in-person social situations.
steps: Open WeChat → Me → Services → Wallet → Bank Cards.
Add a Visa / Mastercard. Verification takes under 2 minutes.
Set payment password. Pay by scanning or showing your QR code to be scanned.
methods.limits: Similar to Alipay. Limits raise after passport upload.
methods.fee: 1–3% foreign transaction fee from your card issuer.

methods.name: Cash (RMB)
methods.summary: Carry small amounts (¥200–500) for street food, rural areas, or as a backup. Note that some small vendors no longer accept cash.
steps: Withdraw from any major bank ATM using Visa / Mastercard / UnionPay / Cirrus / Plus.
Bank of China, ICBC, and China Construction Bank ATMs have English menus.
Daily ATM limit: ¥2,500 per card. Per-transaction fee: typically ¥10–30 + your bank's foreign fee.
methods.fee: ¥10–30 domestic fee + 1–3% from your card issuer.

methods.name: Bank card (Visa / Mastercard)
methods.summary: Hotels, large restaurants, and most big-box stores accept foreign cards. Smaller shops, taxis, and street vendors usually do not.
steps: Always carry a backup Visa or Mastercard.
Notify your bank of travel to avoid anti-fraud blocks.
Expect 1–3% foreign transaction fee on every charge.

tips: Bind your card to BOTH Alipay and WeChat before you leave home. Some merchants only accept one. Setting up takes 5 minutes; troubleshooting in a Beijing hutong takes an hour.
Always choose to pay in the LOCAL currency (CNY) when offered. 'Pay in your home currency' (Dynamic Currency Conversion) usually costs an extra 3–5%.
payment.ctaTitle: Once payments are set, estimate the trip.
payment.ctaBody: Use the budget calculator to see what your days in China will cost in USD and CNY.

transport.title: Передвижение по Китаю
transport.subtitle: Общественный транспорт быстрый, дешёвый, дружелюбный к иностранцам, и не требует китайского номера.

modes.name: High-speed rail (高铁)
modes.summary: The backbone of intercity travel. Up to 350 km/h, English announcements, e-tickets via passport — no paper ticket needed.
booking: Book on 12306.cn (English version) or via the Trip.com app. Avoid third-party resellers charging extra.
Enter your passport number exactly as printed. The name must match.
At the station, scan your passport at the gate — no paper ticket. Foreign passports are accepted at all major stations.
modes.payment: Alipay, WeChat Pay, or Visa / Mastercard via 12306

modes.name: Metro (地铁)
modes.summary: In every major city. Signs are bilingual (Chinese + English). Single-journey tickets from machines; daily caps apply.
booking: Buy a single ticket from the green vending machines (English menu available). Pay cash or scan Alipay / WeChat at the QR reader.
For multi-day stays, buy a rechargeable transport card at the service counter (e.g. Shanghai Public Transportation Card, Beijing Yikatong).
Tap in and tap out. Daily cap means you never pay more than ~¥18/day in any city.
modes.apps: Each city has its own metro app, but Alipay's 'Metro' mini-program covers all major cities.
modes.payment: Cash, Alipay, WeChat Pay, or transport card

modes.name: DiDi (滴滴)
modes.summary: China's Uber. Set pickup, see fare estimate, pay in-app. Works without a Chinese phone number if you bind a Visa / Mastercard.
booking: Download DiDi from the App Store or Google Play.
Sign up with your foreign phone number (Gmail works for email).
Add a Visa or Mastercard to the wallet.
Type destination in English — the driver sees it in Chinese. Use the in-app chat for clarification.

modes.name: Bike-share (共享单车)
modes.summary: Yellow Meituan and blue HelloRide bikes are everywhere. Scan the QR code with Alipay — no app install needed.
booking: Open Alipay, tap 'Scan', and point at the bike's QR code.
First ride: ¥1.5 ($0.20) for 30 min. After: ¥1.5 per 30 min.
Park anywhere on a sidewalk, ending the ride in the app.
modes.apps: Meituan, HelloRide, or just Alipay mini-program

modes.name: Taxi (出租车)
modes.summary: Metered, cheap by Western standards, but cash-only. Useful when DiDi can't find a driver.
booking: Flag a green or red-and-green taxi on the street, or queue at a hotel / station taxi stand.
Show the driver your destination in Chinese characters (use a translation app or a screenshot).
Pay in cash or ask to scan a QR code (most modern taxis accept Alipay / WeChat).
Tip: not expected. Round up if you like.

apps.name: Alipay
apps.why: Pays everywhere. Also unlocks bike-share, metro, DiDi.

apps.name: WeChat
apps.why: Pays + communicates. Hotels and many small shops prefer it.

apps.name: Trip.com
apps.why: Easiest 12306 booking for foreigners. English. Visa / Mastercard.

apps.name: Maps.me or Amap
apps.why: Amap (高德地图) is best in China. Maps.me works offline for cities you've pre-downloaded.

apps.name: Pleco
apps.why: Best Chinese dictionary. Offline. Camera-OCR for menus and signs.

connectivity: China blocks Google, Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook, X, Reddit, most news sites, and many VPNs. Plan ahead.
Buy a SIM at the airport on arrival: China Unicom has the best international roaming. Or rent a pocket WiFi at the airport for ~¥30/day.
Install a VPN BEFORE you arrive. Even with roaming, most Western apps are inaccessible without one. ExpressVPN, Astrill, and LetsVPN are commonly used.
Hotel WiFi and most cafe WiFi also require a Chinese phone number to receive a one-time SMS code. Plan B: eSIM with China data.
transport.ctaTitle: Now you know how to move. Plan the route.
transport.ctaBody: Use the planner to combine cities, days, and interests. Get a recommended route and an estimated budget.

footer.desc: Независимый гид для транзитных путешественников в Китай на рекламе. Туры не продаём, комиссий не берём.
footer.disclosure: Сайт показывает рекламу через Google AdSense. Некоторые ссылки могут быть партнёрскими.

consent.text: Мы используем cookie для аналитики и рекламы. Можно принять все, только аналитику или только необходимые.
